reviews.review_text: I really love these running shoes. The mesh upper is highly breathable and the rubber soles have a fantastic grip for morning road runs. Fits true to size and provides great arch comfort.
Highly comfortable performance shoes for daily training. The cushioning is excellent and feels soft. The stitching is solid. A bit tight on the toe box initially, but relaxed after wearing.
Perfect fit and amazing cushion. I run 10k daily and these shoes have really minimized heel pain. The lace system holds the foot securely. Extremely satisfied with this purchase.
